context.revisionDescription: Editor-only popover restructure in FooterInfoSocialItem.tsx: outer wrapper div now uses flex column layout with gap instead of padding; LinkControl sits directly in wrapper; ToggleControl and both TextControls wrapped in inner div with side+bottom padding only. No PHP counterpart — Popover is editor-only.

lint.notes: No warnings in any Footer block files.
